name: AtriCure, Inc.
summary: Overview We are a leading innovator in surgical treatments and therapies for atrial fibrillation (Afib or AF), left atrial appendage (LAA) management and post-operative pain management. Afib is an irregular heartbeat, or arrhythmia, which affects over 59 million people worldwide and is a growing epidemic. It is the most common cardiac arrhythmia encountered in clinical practice and results in high utilization of healthcare services and significant cost burden. Patients often progress from being ...
